results.title: Baranga Third-Degree Torture Allegation: Rakesh Behera Undergoing Treatment in Cuttack
results.description: #ବ ାରଙ୍ଗ_ଥାର୍ଡ_ଡିଗ୍ରୀ #କ େମିତି_ଅଛନ୍ତି_ରାକେଶ ବାରଙ୍ଗ ଥାର୍ଡ ଡିଗ୍ରୀ ଘଟଣା । ରାକେଶ ବେହେରାଙ୍କୁ ପ୍ରବଳ ମାଡ ମାରିଥିବା ଅଭିଯୋଗ । କଟକ ବଡ଼ ଡାକ୍ତରଖାନାରେ ଚିକିତ୍ସିତ ହେଉଛନ୍ତି ରାକେଶ । ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ ତାଙ୍କର ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟାବସ୍ଥା ଖୁବ୍ ଗୁରୁତର ଥିବା କହିଲେ ବାପା । Serious allegations have emerged in the Baranga third-degree torture case, with claims that Rakesh Behera was subjected to severe physical assault. #BarangaCase #RakeshBehera #ThirdDegreeTorture #Cuttack #OdishaNews #HumanRights #JusticeDemand #BreakingNews #SCBHospital #OdishaTV #otv For latest news updates follow us on WhatsApp: https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VaYNIW78qIzrtKKZiD3M OdishaTV is Odisha's no 1 News Channel. results.title: AI plays pivotal role in taking faster decisions, managing complex battlefields, says Army Chief
results.description: Pune, May 30, 2026 Indian Army chief General Upendra Dwivedi on Saturday emphasised the increasing significance of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in contemporary warfare, stating that emerging technologies are becoming indispensable for faster decision-making and effective management of the growing complexity of military operations. Addressing reporters after reviewing the Passing Out Parade of the 150th Course [...] The post AI plays pivotal role in taking faster decisions, managing complex battlefields, says Army Chief appeared first on Yes Punjab News .

results.title: Pete Hegseth reels back China ‘threat’ warnings as he reveals White House priority
results.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth toned down his language on China while speaking at the Shangri-La conference in Singapore after a recent state visit to Beijing.

results.description: Leighton Davies' family were called to his hospital bed to say their goodbyes, but thanks to a lot of fight and some incredible support from staff at Morriston Hospital, the grandfather of five is recovering well

results.title: Daily Horoscope Today, May 30, 2026: Venus Squares Saturn and the Stars Are Done Being Kind to These Zodiac Signs
results.description: Daily Horoscope Today, May 30, 2026: Saturday does not arrive gently. Venus in Gemini locks into a tense square with Saturn in Aries at dawn, and the Moon burns through the final degrees of Scorpio before shifting into freewheeling Sagittarius by midday, dragging every zodiac sign into a collision between what they desire and what they have actually earned. The Sun and Mercury both blaze through Gemini, keeping conversations fast, ideas electric, and nervous systems slightly overloaded. Mars continues its slow, deliberate march through Taurus, insisting that nothing worth having arrives without patience. Pluto retrograde in Aquarius presses silently on

results.title: ‘Technical glitch’ delays CUET-UG 2026 exam at some centres
